title: Once Upon a Time in Venezuela
original_title: Érase una vez en Venezuela, Congo Mirador
overview: Once upon a time, the Venezuelan village of Congo Mirador was prosperous, alive with fisherman and poets. Now it is decaying and disintegrating—a small but prophetic reflection of Venezuela itself.
